mapper.sql: CASE WHEN us.sync_time IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN CONVERT(DATE, us.sync_time) < CONVERT(DATE, em_latest.sync_date) THEN 0 ELSE us.sync_status END

FROM ( SELECT staff_id, MAX(sync_date) AS sync_date FROM employee_modifications
CONVERT(DATE, sync_date) BETWEEN CONVERT(DATE, #{startDate}) AND CONVERT(DATE, #{endDate})
GROUP BY staff_id ) em_latest INNER JOIN employee_information ei ON em_latest.staff_id = ei.id LEFT JOIN ihr_employee_update_status us ON em_latest.staff_id = us.staff_id
AND ei.staff_name LIKE '%' + #{staffName} + '%'
AND ei.staff_no LIKE '%' + #{staffNo} + '%'
AND = #{syncStatus}
AND ei.staff_no NOT IN
#{sno}
mapper.select:
SELECT em_latest.staff_id AS staffId, ei.staff_name AS staffName, ei.staff_no AS staffNo, ei.mobile_no AS mobileNo, ei.department_name AS departmentName, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), em_latest.sync_date, 120) AS modifyDate, ei.staff_status AS staffStatus, AS syncStatus, us.sync_time AS syncTime, us.error_message AS errorMessage
ORDER BY em_latest.sync_date DESC, ei.staff_name OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: MERGE ihr_employee_update_status AS target USING (SELECT #{entity.staffId} AS staff_id) AS source ON target.staff_id = source.staff_id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET staff_name = #{entity.staffName}, staff_no = #{entity.staffNo}, sync_status = #{entity.syncStatus}, sync_time = #{entity.syncTime}, error_message = #{entity.errorMessage}, update_time = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (staff_id, staff_name, staff_no, sync_status, sync_time, error_message, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{entity.staffId}, #{entity.staffName}, #{entity.staffNo}, #{entity.syncStatus}, #{entity.syncTime}, #{entity.errorMessage}, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
